SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2014 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-21-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEBTOR TO PAY $500 BY MONEY ORDER TO CREDITOR TODAY. CREDITOR TO GIVE RECEIPT TO DEBTOR AFTER PAYMENT. DEBTOR HAS AGREED TO PAY CREDITOR $50 PER MONTH STARTING FEB 1, 2014 AND THEREAFTER $50 EVERY MONTH UNTIL JUDGMENT AMOUNT OF $2, 000 PAID IN FULL. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED EVERY 6 MONTHS UNTIL JUDGMENT PAID IN FULL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
